---
title: "Powell Elevation Projection"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# Load Libraries
install.packages("ggplot2")
library("ggplot2")


## Set Current Storage: All data from https://usbr.gov/uc/water/hydrodata/reservoir_data/919/dashboard.html#csv/
storage <- read.csv("Storage.csv")
storage$datetime <- as.Date(storage$datetime)
current_storage <- storage[which.max(storage$datetime),]

# Set Inflows
inflow <- read.csv("Inflow.csv")
inflow_proj <- data.frame(inflow$ESP.Min, inflow$ESP.Most, inflow$ESP.Max, as.Date(inflow$datetime, format = "%m/%d/%Y"))
names(inflow_proj)[4] <- "datetime"

# Define Inflow Projection (Currently Based on )
inflow_most_fun <- approxfun(as.numeric(inflow_proj$datetime),inflow_proj$inflow.ESP.Most)

# Set Releases
outflow <- read.csv("Outflow.csv")
outflow_proj <- data.frame(outflow$ESP.Min, outflow$ESP.Most, as.Date(outflow$datetime, format = "%m/%d/%Y"))
names(outflow_proj)[3] <- "datetime"

outflow_most_fun <- approxfun(outflow_proj$datetime, outflow_proj$outflow.ESP.Most)


# Set Evaporation
evaporation <- read.csv("Evaporation.csv")
evaporation$datetime <-as.Date(evaporation$datetime)

evap_data<- merge(evaporation[evaporation$evaporation > 0,], storage, by = "datetime")
evap_clean <- aggregate(evaporation ~ storage, data = evap_data, FUN = mean)

evap_fun <- approxfun(evap_clean$storage, evap_clean$evaporation, rule = 2)

# Conversion from storage to elevation setup

elevation <- read.csv("Elevation.csv")
elevation$datetime <- as.Date(elevation$datetime)

elev_data<- merge(elevation, storage, by = "datetime")
elev_clean <- aggregate(pool.elevation ~ storage, data = elev_data, FUN = mean)

elev_fun <- approxfun(elev_clean$storage, elev_clean$pool.elevation, rule = 2)

# Merge Data
additive <- merge(current_storage, inflow_proj, by = "datetime", all = TRUE)
subtractive <- merge(outflow_proj, evaporation, by= "datetime", all = TRUE)
df <- merge(additive, subtractive, by = "datetime", all = TRUE)

# Interpolate
time_grid <- seq(from = (current_storage$datetime-10), to = as.Date("2027-10-01"), by = "month")

inflow_most_i <- inflow_most_fun(time_grid)
outflow_most_i <- outflow_most_fun(time_grid)


df<- data.frame(datetime = time_grid, inflow = inflow_most_i, outflow = outflow_most_i)
df$storage_proj <- numeric(nrow(df))

diff(df$datetime)
df$days_in_step <- c(as.numeric(diff(df$datetime)), NA)

## Iterate Projected Storage

start_idx <- which.min(abs(df$datetime - current_storage$datetime))
df$storage_proj[start_idx] <- current_storage$storage

for (i in (start_idx + 1):nrow(df)) {
  evap_rate_i <- evap_fun(df$storage_proj[i-1])
  evap_total_i <- evap_rate_i *df$days_in_step[i-1]
  
  df$storage_proj[i] <-
      df$storage_proj[i - 1] +
      df$inflow[i] -
      df$outflow[i] -
      evap_total_i

}

df$elev_proj <-elev_fun(df$storage_proj)


# Figure 1: Projected Elevations
fig_1 <- ggplot(df, aes(x=datetime, y=elev_proj)) + geom_line(color = "blue") + ylab("Lake Powell Elevation (feet)")+scale_x_date(date_labels = "%m-%Y") + geom_point()
min_power_pool_elev <- geom_hline(yintercept = 3490, color = "orange")
dead_pool_elev <- geom_hline(yintercept = 3370, color = "red")
fig_1 + min_power_pool_elev

# Calculate Projected Elevation on October 1, 2026
df$elev_proj[which.min(abs(df$datetime - as.Date("2026-10-01")))]
